resources.title: Matching Workflow & Orchestration
resources.subtitle: Data identity · update cadence · GenAI routing · write gates
resources.description: Interactive 4-tab visualization of the SaSMaster matching workflow. Covers all 5 contributor sources (IMDB 206.97M/TMDB 1.18M/Gracenote 635K/EIDR 247K/Wikidata), Parent Key Spine (861,878 v2 rows), 3-phase matching engine (exact→fuzzy→conflict), record routing (32,795 certified/5,142 partial/138 P3 conflicts), GenAI 4-use-case intelligence layer, update cadence per source, OPUS resolution paths, 4 curated pipeline cards, build sequence (catalog→①→③‖→②→④), and write-gate registry (LIVE/HELD/WALLED/BUILD). Built 2026-05-29 (TASK-VIZ-MATCH-001).

resources.title: Autonomous Coding System
resources.subtitle: Reactive execution · Spec-driven mode · build-auto · JARVIS integration · SQLite WAL
resources.description: SaSMaster Autonomous Coding System overview. Covers reactive execution (build-auto TASKS.md mode), spec-driven mode (!build-auto <spec>), JARVIS integration, SQLite WAL state store, circuit breakers (feature=20min/$5/2r; run=$30/3hr), cost logging to cost-log.jsonl, and Slack start+done pings. Planning model: Opus. Execution model: Sonnet-4-6.

resources.title: UI/UX Engineering Brief

Read before touching any portal UI.

resources.title: Three Surfaces — Routing Guide
resources.subtitle: Claude.ai · Claude Code · JARVIS queue · Token optimization · Parallel execution
resources.description: Routing decisions for the three SaSMaster execution surfaces: Claude.ai, Claude Code, and JARVIS queue. Covers when to use each, token optimization rules, bulk batching patterns, and parallel execution guidelines.

resources.title: Research Portal v2 · RAG+CAG Intelligence
resources.subtitle: DuckDB BM25 KB search · CAG title briefs · 29 methodology entries · Dr. Scoop wired
resources.description: RESEARCH-PORTAL-002: RAG+CAG intelligence layer for Dr. Scoop. KB files (PRIM/NARR/CLAIM/MOAT/MISSION — 29 entries) committed to command-api/knowledge/. DuckDB in-memory BM25 index (kb-search.ts). CAG title brief engine with SSE streaming (/api/scoop/brief/:tmdbId). Every chat request injects top-3 KB entries via cache_control ephemeral. Portal _sendTitleBrief() calls CAG endpoint first, falls back to generic streamScoop(). Drill-down P3.5/P4: CARD_META enrichment (20 titles), switchDrillTab(), _buildRightsGrid(), openTrailer(), cast monogram fix. Built 2026-05-26.

resources.title: Research Portal v1 · Phase 1
resources.subtitle: Phase 1 · Programming Intelligence · Ad Research · Market Intel · Exchange
resources.description: RESEARCH-PORTAL-001 Phase 1: B2C Programming Research Portal. Dark broadcast terminal aesthetic (midnight black + amber). Live ticker, 4-tab navigation, 3 research module cards, intelligence feed with trending content + market signals. Phase 2 will wire real data from api.sasmaster.dev. Built 2026-05-24.

resources.title: Spending Limits
resources.subtitle: Token budgets · Cost guard · Model pricing · Audit runbook
resources.description: SaSMaster cost control reference. Covers daily token budget thresholds (warn 150K, abort 250K), how to audit current spend via cost-log.jsonl, per-model pricing reference (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku), budget philosophy, and RULE-002 single-phase cost alert ($2). Built 2026-05-24 (HARDEN-001 + WAR-ROOM-001).

resources.title: Parallel Agent Architecture
resources.subtitle: Fan-out patterns · Task tool · S3 handoff · 4 execution models · cost model · RESEARCH-PORTAL-001
resources.description: Design doc for parallel agent execution in SaSMaster. Covers 4 execution models (sequential, shell fan-out, Claude Code Task tool, async S3 queue), recommended Option C architecture for RESEARCH-PORTAL-001, cost model (~$0.55 parallel vs $0.25 sequential), inter-agent communication patterns, failure handling rules, and first application fan-out table. Built 2026-05-24 (HARDEN-010).

resources.title: Memory Hygiene Agent
resources.subtitle: MEMORY-HYGIENE-AGENT-001 · nightly 03:00 EDT · Haiku 4.5 · RETIRE/UPDATE/ADD · Obsidian archive
resources.description: Nightly agent that reads CLAUDE_MEMORY.md warm layer, detects stale/superseded/duplicate HOT entries via Claude Haiku, generates outputs/memory-hygiene-report.md, archives retired entries to knowledge-bank/.obsidian/_archive/hot-memory-retired/, and posts Slack digest to #sasmaster-builds. Cron 0 7 * * * (03:00 EDT). Built 2026-05-26 (MEMORY-HYGIENE-AGENT-001).
